Enum Class ClanPermission

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ClanPermission>
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.model.ClanPermission
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ClanPermission>, Constable
public enum ClanPermission extends Enum<ClanPermission>
A capability that can be granted to or revoked from an individual clan member.

Each capability permission has a paired GRANT_* counterpart that controls who may assign or revoke that capability. Only the clan LEADER may assign GRANT_* permissions; a member holding GRANT_X may assign or revoke X on other members.

Use isGrant(), asGrant(), and asBase() to navigate between a permission and its counterpart without string manipulation at call sites.

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    BREAK_BLOCKS
    Can break blocks in chunks claimed by this clan.
    CLAIM_TERRITORY
    Can claim chunks on behalf of the clan.
    GRANT_BREAK_BLOCKS
    Can grant or revoke BREAK_BLOCKS on other members.
    GRANT_CLAIM_TERRITORY
    Can grant or revoke CLAIM_TERRITORY on other members.
    GRANT_INTERACT
    Can grant or revoke INTERACT on other members.
    GRANT_INVITE_MEMBERS
    Can grant or revoke INVITE_MEMBERS on other members.
    GRANT_KICK_MEMBERS
    Can grant or revoke KICK_MEMBERS on other members.
    GRANT_KILL_ANIMALS
    Can grant or revoke KILL_ANIMALS on other members.
    GRANT_KILL_MONSTERS
    Can grant or revoke KILL_MONSTERS on other members.
    GRANT_MANAGE_WARP
    Can grant or revoke MANAGE_WARP on other members.
    GRANT_OPEN_CONTAINERS
    Can grant or revoke OPEN_CONTAINERS on other members.
    GRANT_PLACE_BLOCKS
    Can grant or revoke PLACE_BLOCKS on other members.
    GRANT_SET_MOTD
    Can grant or revoke SET_MOTD on other members.
    GRANT_UNCLAIM_TERRITORY
    Can grant or revoke UNCLAIM_TERRITORY on other members.
    GRANT_USE_DOORS
    Can grant or revoke USE_DOORS on other members.
    INTERACT
    Can interact with buttons, levers, crafting tables, etc.
    INVITE_MEMBERS
    Can invite players to the clan.
    KICK_MEMBERS
    Can kick members from the clan.
    KILL_ANIMALS
    Can kill passive animals in chunks claimed by this clan.
    KILL_MONSTERS
    Can kill hostile monsters in chunks claimed by this clan.
    MANAGE_WARP
    Can create, remove, restrict, and manage access for the clan's warps.
    OPEN_CONTAINERS
    Can open containers (chests, barrels, etc.) in chunks claimed by this clan.
    PLACE_BLOCKS
    Can place blocks in chunks claimed by this clan.
    SET_MOTD
    Can set the clan's message of the day.
    UNCLAIM_TERRITORY
    Can unclaim chunks on behalf of the clan.
    USE_DOORS
    Can use doors, gates, and trapdoors in chunks claimed by this clan.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • BREAK_BLOCKS

      public static final ClanPermission BREAK_BLOCKS
      Can break blocks in chunks claimed by this clan.

    • GRANT_BREAK_BLOCKS

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_BREAK_BLOCKS
      Can grant or revoke BREAK_BLOCKS on other members.

    • PLACE_BLOCKS

      public static final ClanPermission PLACE_BLOCKS
      Can place blocks in chunks claimed by this clan.

    • GRANT_PLACE_BLOCKS

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_PLACE_BLOCKS
      Can grant or revoke PLACE_BLOCKS on other members.

    • KILL_ANIMALS

      public static final ClanPermission KILL_ANIMALS
      Can kill passive animals in chunks claimed by this clan.

    • GRANT_KILL_ANIMALS

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_KILL_ANIMALS
      Can grant or revoke KILL_ANIMALS on other members.

    • KILL_MONSTERS

      public static final ClanPermission KILL_MONSTERS
      Can kill hostile monsters in chunks claimed by this clan.

    • GRANT_KILL_MONSTERS

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_KILL_MONSTERS
      Can grant or revoke KILL_MONSTERS on other members.

    • OPEN_CONTAINERS

      public static final ClanPermission OPEN_CONTAINERS
      Can open containers (chests, barrels, etc.) in chunks claimed by this clan.

    • GRANT_OPEN_CONTAINERS

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_OPEN_CONTAINERS
      Can grant or revoke OPEN_CONTAINERS on other members.

    • USE_DOORS

      public static final ClanPermission USE_DOORS
      Can use doors, gates, and trapdoors in chunks claimed by this clan.

    • GRANT_USE_DOORS

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_USE_DOORS
      Can grant or revoke USE_DOORS on other members.

    • INTERACT

      public static final ClanPermission INTERACT
      Can interact with buttons, levers, crafting tables, etc. in chunks claimed by this clan.

    • GRANT_INTERACT

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_INTERACT
      Can grant or revoke INTERACT on other members.

    • INVITE_MEMBERS

      public static final ClanPermission INVITE_MEMBERS
      Can invite players to the clan.

    • GRANT_INVITE_MEMBERS

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_INVITE_MEMBERS
      Can grant or revoke INVITE_MEMBERS on other members.

    • KICK_MEMBERS

      public static final ClanPermission KICK_MEMBERS
      Can kick members from the clan. Cannot be used against the LEADER.

    • GRANT_KICK_MEMBERS

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_KICK_MEMBERS
      Can grant or revoke KICK_MEMBERS on other members.

    • CLAIM_TERRITORY

      public static final ClanPermission CLAIM_TERRITORY
      Can claim chunks on behalf of the clan.

    • GRANT_CLAIM_TERRITORY

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_CLAIM_TERRITORY
      Can grant or revoke CLAIM_TERRITORY on other members.

    • UNCLAIM_TERRITORY

      public static final ClanPermission UNCLAIM_TERRITORY
      Can unclaim chunks on behalf of the clan.

    • GRANT_UNCLAIM_TERRITORY

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_UNCLAIM_TERRITORY
      Can grant or revoke UNCLAIM_TERRITORY on other members.

    • MANAGE_WARP

      public static final ClanPermission MANAGE_WARP
      Can create, remove, restrict, and manage access for the clan's warps.

    • GRANT_MANAGE_WARP

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_MANAGE_WARP
      Can grant or revoke MANAGE_WARP on other members.

    • SET_MOTD

      public static final ClanPermission SET_MOTD
      Can set the clan's message of the day.

    • GRANT_SET_MOTD

      public static final ClanPermission GRANT_SET_MOTD
      Can grant or revoke SET_MOTD on other members.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static ClanPermission[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static ClanPermission valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • isGrant

      public boolean isGrant()
      Returns:
      true if this is a GRANT_* permission

    • asGrant

      public ClanPermission asGrant()
      Returns the GRANT_* counterpart of this permission. If this is already a GRANT_* permission, returns itself.
      Returns:
      the grant counterpart, e.g. BREAK_BLOCKS → GRANT_BREAK_BLOCKS

    • asBase

      public ClanPermission asBase()
      Returns the base capability permission for this GRANT_* entry. If this is already a base permission, returns itself.
      Returns:
      the base permission, e.g. GRANT_BREAK_BLOCKS → BREAK_BLOCKS

    • parse

      public static Optional<ClanPermission> parse(String raw)
      Parses a permission name, returning empty (instead of throwing) for unknown values.
      Parameters:
      raw - the permission name to parse
      Returns:
      the matching permission, or empty if the name is not recognised
